name: @jeswr/agentic-solid-conformance-tools
description: Generator + consistency checker for the agentic-solid-conformance vectors. LOCAL TOOLING pinned to the reference implementations — the vectors themselves are self-describing and never require this package.

scripts.generate: node generate/odrl-delegation.mjs && node generate/aac-chain.mjs && node generate/aac-status.mjs && node generate/a2a.mjs
